title: festuca myuros subsp. sciuroides
intro: Festuca myuros subsp. sciuroides, commonly known as false chamomile, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Festuca myuros subsp. sciuroides include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
